summary: Long‑awaited soundboard matrix release with solid audio quality, though the show itself isn’t described in detail.
review: Reviewers are thrilled to finally have a soundboard‑matrix recording of this long‑sought concert, praising its availability and thanking the archivist. No specific musical commentary is provided, so the performance can only be assumed satisfactory, while the matrix source suggests a clear and balanced mix.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review (4‑star) focusing on the recording’s release; no detailed show assessment, so rating relies mainly on reviewer enthusiasm for the matrix.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer expresses excitement about finally getting a soundboard‑matrix source and mentions no problems, implying clear, balanced audio.
